generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#
prefix base: http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#
instance MotorEncoders : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoders measuring position and angular velocity for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot",
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionDataTransmitted, AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]
instance SecondaryEncoders : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoders behind the gearbox measuring position data for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot",
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionDataTransmitted
]
instance CurrentSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensors measuring input current for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]
instance PositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoders, SecondaryEncoders
]
instance AngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoders
]
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensors
]
instance MeasuredMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current data from current sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]
instance MeasuredPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured position data from motor and secondary encoders",
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionDataTransmitted
]
instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity data from motor encoders",
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]
instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque data for friction model comparison",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted, PositionDataTransmitted, AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]
instance SimulatedPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated position data for comparison",
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionDataTransmitted
]
instance SimulatedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity data for comparison",
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]
instance SimulatedMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor current data for comparison",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]
instance SysMLComponentDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML component diagram for structural modeling of the first axis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]
instance SysMLConnectorDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML connector diagram for structural modeling of the first axis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]
instance SimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink simulation model for the first axis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Coulomb-Viscous friction model for joint dynamics",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Black-box Stribeck friction model for joint dynamics",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for joint dynamics",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for joint dynamics",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance AASInstance : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin integration",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]
instance RobotSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SystemUnderStudy, MotorEncoders, SecondaryEncoders, CurrentSensors
]
instance SystemUnderStudy : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot",
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment RobotSystemEnvironment
]
instance FrictionDynamicsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into joint friction dynamics used to adjust control algorithms for improved robot motion accuracy"
]
instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization insights for monitoring robot performance"
]
instance MotionAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Improved motion accuracy through friction model integration"
]
instance StructuralModelingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from structural modeling for system design"
]
instance AASIntegrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from AAS integration for digital twin interoperability"
]
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionDynamicsInsight
]
instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot axis data via dashboard",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]
instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through friction model integration",
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyInsight
]
instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural modeling service using SysML",
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelingInsight
]
instance AASIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for integrating Asset Administration Shells",
    DTDFVocab:provides AASIntegrationInsight
]
instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation and friction modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]
instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]
instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for digital twin integration",
    DTDFVocab:enables AASIntegrationService
]
instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming from sensors",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]
instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for real-time monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No interaction; digital shadow functions as a passive entity with one-way data flow from physical to virtual only, no data pushed back to physical system"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with data streamed via MQTT for continuous friction model identification during robot operation"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical sensors, SysML-based structural models, Simulink simulation models, Asset Administration Shells (AAS), and a dashboard for visualization, connected via MQTT for real-time data flow"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, utilizing live operational data to model friction during robot operation"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity validated by comparing simulated data against measured reference data; deviation analysis used to identify friction loss"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical robot to digital shadow"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Industry 4.0 standards via Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML for modeling"
]
